reasoning_model_1: Model 1 accurately synthesizes the text 'Good morning! The weather is really nice today, I feel great.' without any errors. model_comparison: Both models produce high-quality, fluent audio that matches the text script. However, regarding the core constraint 'Pitch', Model 1 demonstrates a stronger adherence. Model 2 provides a very natural, enthusiastic performance, but the pitch is standard for an excited female speaker and does not push the boundary of 'high pitch' as clearly as Model 1. Therefore, Model 1 is judged to have better feature control for the specific parameter requested.
